caption: Akshara-recognition top-1 accuracy (baseline PixelEncoder) on the PA.002 split, by frequency bucket and seam_source, with 95% bootstrap CIs. Orange = bottom quartile (metric M). Reference numbers from a weak encoder + 1-shot cross-font data; the JEPA encoder replaces it at PA.005. The metric machinery is frozen here before the K1/K3 sweep.
